description: A ramp supervisor must coordinate all ground activities to ensure an aircraft departs on time.

nodes.task_description: Confirm that the aircraft has been parked and chocked upon arrival.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies the aircraft is secure.

nodes.task_description: Coordinate the fueling, catering, and baggage loading teams to service the aircraft simultaneously.

expected_outcome.value: Agent ensures all ground servicing tasks are happening in parallel.

nodes.task_description: Authorize the aircraft pushback once all doors are closed and the ground crew is clear.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gives the final clearance for pushback.
